summary: Iteration 74: OCB TITAN ERP Enterprise Stabilization v2.4.0 - ALL FEATURES VERIFIED. P0: Data Sheet edit-only (no create button), P1: Quick Create Supplier in Item Form works, P2: Supplier auto-select after creation verified in code, P3: Assembly module with DRAFT/POSTED/REVERSED/CANCELLED statuses, P4-P5: Blueprint v2.4.0 displayed in UI header.
critical_code_review_comments: ALL P0-P5 FEATURES VERIFIED:
P0 DATA SHEET - EDIT ONLY (NO CREATE):
- UI shows: 'Data Sheet adalah modul untuk edit massal item existing'
- Available buttons: Refresh, Export CSV (NO Tambah Item button)
- Info banner: 'Untuk membuat item baru, gunakan menu Master Data → Items'
- Data type tabs: Produk (63 items), Pelanggan, Supplier, Karyawan
- VERIFIED: No Create Item button in Data Sheet ✓
P1 QUICK CREATE SUPPLIER IN ITEM FORM:
- Supplier Default field has '(+ Baru)' green indicator
- Dropdown shows 'Tambah Supplier Baru' option at top
- QuickCreateModal opens with fields: Code, Name, Contact Person, Phone, Email, Address
- API POST /api/suppliers works correctly
- VERIFIED: Quick Create Supplier feature EXISTS ✓
P2 SUPPLIER AUTO-SELECT AFTER CREATION:
- Code verified in QuickCreateModal.jsx line 362: onValueChange(newItem.id)
- Code verified in ItemFormModal.jsx line 100: setFormData.supplier_id = newItem.id
- handleQuickCreateSupplierSuccess callback handles auto-selection
- VERIFIED: Supplier auto-select implemented ✓
P3 ASSEMBLY MODULE WITH STATUSES:
- UI shows 'Rakitan Produk' with Formula Rakitan and Riwayat Transaksi tabs
- 7 formulas via /api/assembly-enterprise/formulas/v2 (all ACTIVE)
- 8 transactions with statuses: DRAFT (4), CANCELLED (3), REVERSED (1)
- Rakit (Assembly) and Bongkar (Disassembly) buttons available
- Legacy API backward compatibility verified
- VERIFIED: Assembly POST/REVERSED flow implemented ✓
P4-P5 BLUEPRINT v2.4.0 DISPLAY:
- UI header shows 'Blueprint v2.4.0' in top right corner
- Active tenant: OCB GROUP (ocb_titan) with ACTIVE badge
- VERIFIED: Blueprint v2.4.0 displayed ✓
seed_data_creation: Created TEST-QC-API-SUPPLIER via POST /api/suppliers for API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Enterprise Stabilization v2.4.0 complete. All P0-P5 features verified. Data Sheet is edit-only, Quick Create Supplier works in Item Form with auto-select, Assembly module shows 4 DRAFT, 3 CANCELLED, 1 REVERSED transactions.
